overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a flying vehicle in Cyberpunk 2077, navigating through heavy fog over Night City. The vehicle approaches and passes under a massive flying cargo ship before continuing into the dense downtown skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: flying vehicle approach over industrial Watson district

events.description: flying vehicle passes directly underneath the massive cargo ship, temporarily blocking the sky view

agents.ego_description: flying vehicle approaching the large cargo ship ahead at high speed through fog

notable_agents.action: massive flying cargo ship hovering stationary or moving slowly ahead in the fog

entered.detail: high-tech cockpit interior with green holographic displays and steering wheel
massive industrial flying vessel with container sections and glowing engines
low-rise industrial buildings and structures of the Watson district visible through fog

segments.scene_description: From the cockpit of a flying vehicle, the camera approaches a massive cargo ship hovering in the foggy sky over Night City's industrial Watson district. The dashboard displays green holographic readouts as the vehicle closes the distance to the ship.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from industrial district to downtown skyline

events.description: flying from industrial Watson district into dense downtown Night City with tall skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: flying vehicle passing the cargo ship on the left side and heading toward downtown

notable_agents.action: cargo ship now alongside to the left, moving parallel or stationary as the vehicle passes

entered.detail: tall futuristic skyscrapers of downtown Night City emerging from the fog ahead

segments.scene_description: Having passed under the cargo ship, the vehicle now flies with the massive vessel visible to the left. The industrial district gives way to the dense downtown skyline as tall skyscrapers emerge from the fog ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense downtown urban canyon between skyscrapers

events.description: flying cargo ship finally exits view to the left rear as vehicle enters deep downtown

agents.ego_description: flying vehicle navigating through the dense downtown skyscraper canyon in heavy fog

entered.detail: close-up views of massive glass and steel skyscraper walls passing by
towering building facades on the right side creating an urban canyon

segments.scene_description: The vehicle flies deep into the downtown core, surrounded by towering skyscrapers on both sides forming an urban canyon. The cargo ship is left behind as the vehicle continues through the fog-shrouded cityscape between massive building facades.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person flight from a foggy industrial outskirts into the claustrophobic heart of a futuristic metropolis. It begins in the cockpit of a flying vehicle, where green holographic readouts glow on the dashboard as the craft approaches a massive cargo ship hovering in the haze of the Watson district. As the vehicle glides beneath the vessel, the industrial landscape recedes and the scene opens up to reveal the dense downtown skyline emerging from the fog. The camera then pushes deeper into the urban core, leaving the cargo ship behind as the horizon is replaced by towering skyscrapers. Finally, the flight settles into a narrow urban canyon, flanked on both sides by massive building facades that loom through the persistent mist.
